name: Manderin Almond Salad
recipeInstructions:
----------------------------------DRESSING----------------------------------
1 1/2 tsp Salt
2 tbsp Vinegar
2 tbsp Sugar
1/4 cup Salad oil
1 tbsp Parsley
1 pinch Pepper
1 pinch Tabasco
-----------------------------SALAD INGREDIENTS-----------------------------
2 heads Butter lettuce (Preferred)
1 cup Celery, diced fine
3 Green onions with tops, finely chopped
11 oz Mandarin oranges, drained
Combine the dressing ingredients and mix well. Refrigerate for a few hours to marry the flavors. Just before serving, tear the lettuce into bite-size pieces and combine with celery, onions, and mandarin oranges. Toss with dressing and nuts, then place on one larger head of butter lettuce to cradle the salad. This will serve 6, so it's suggested to cut it in half.
